zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Lovaine於1267年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton31歲，母親Helisant De Bohun18歲。她於1287年12月20日之前與William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland結婚。她去世於1326年5月3日在英國艾可登莫福享年59歲，埋葬在英國艾可登莫福。

nameMeanings.name: Lovaine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Lorraine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Lovaine was born in 1267, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, was 31 and her mother, Helisant De Bohun, was 18. She married William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland before 20 December 1287. She died on 3 May 1326, in Dunmow, Essex, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Dunmow, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Lovaine est née en 1267, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Helisant De Bohun, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland avant 20 décembre 1287. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1326, à Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Lovaine 1267 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton 31 und ihre Mutter Helisant De Bohun 18. Sie hat vor 20. Dezember 1287 William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland geheiratet. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1326 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Dunmow, Essex, England und wurde in Dunmow, Essex, England begraben.

Lei sposato William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland prima del 20 dicembre 1287. Morì il 3 maggio 1326, nel Dunmow, Essex, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunmow, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Lovaineが1267年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Matthew II de Louvain of Little Eastonは31歳，母Helisant De Bohunは18歳であった。1287年12月20日以前にWilliam de Ferrers Constable of Scotlandと結婚した。彼女は1326年5月3日にイギリスエセックスダンモウで59歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスダンモウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Lovaine(이)가 1267년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helisant De Bohun(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1287년 12월 20일 이전 William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1326년 5월 3일 영국 에세스 던모에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 던모에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Lovaine nasceu em 1267, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Helisant De Bohun, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland antes 20 de dezembro de 1287. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1326, em Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Lovaine родилась в 1267 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Helisant De Bohun, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland перед 20 декабрь 1287 г. Она умерла 3 мая 1326 г. в местности дунмоу, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности дунмоу, эссекс, Англия.
